prompt: Add comprehensive test coverage for the specified module or function.
steps: Read the target module to understand all public functions and their contracts.
Identify existing tests (if any) and note coverage gaps.
Write tests covering: happy path, edge cases, error conditions, and boundary values.
Follow the project's existing test patterns and fixtures.
Run the test suite to verify all new tests pass.
Run the linter on the new test file.
extra_instructions: Use descriptive test names that explain the scenario being tested. Mock external dependencies. Each test should test ONE thing. Aim for at least 90% line coverage of the target module.
